violations.text: RTE packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. The Contains statement is incorrect and lacking major allergens which are included in the ingredients statement. Net quantity of product is absent on product label. Establishment to submit corrected labels to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026
